Off Calendar Jan-08-2025 Continued To Apr-08-25 At 10:30 A.M. In Dept 610

Notice Of And Motion For Entry Of Judgment Pursuant To Stipulation Of The Parties
Off Calendar Dec-20-2024 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: No appearances. The Court adopts the tentative ruling as follows:

PLAINTIFF ONEMAIN FINANCIAL GROUP, LLC, AS SERVICER FOR ('ASF') WILMINGTON TRUST, N.A., AS ISSUER LOAN TRUSTEE FOR ONEMAIN FINANCIAL ISSUANCE TRUST 2018-1's Motion For Entry Of Judgment Pursuant To Stipulation Of The Parties.

Plaintiff ONEMAIN FINANCIAL GROUP, LLC's Motion For Entry Of Judgment Pursuant To Stipulation Of The Parties to which no opposition was filed is GRANTED. Good cause appearing, the court will enter Judgment in favor of Plaintiff ONEMAIN FINANCIAL GROUP, LLC and against Defendant MARCELO SAMAME ("Defendant") pursuant to the stipulation of the Parties. Plaintiff ONEMAIN FINANCIAL GROUP, LLC's must promptly lodge with this department a proposed order consistent with this ruling and, separately, a proposed judgment. The proposed judgment shall not include counsel's or the represented party's name or information in the upper left-hand corner of the caption page. A Judicial Council form may be used if appropriate. Submission consistent with the Code and Rules of Court.

Prevailing party to submit a proposed order that repeats verbatim the court's ruling.

Judge: Joseph M. Quinn, Clerk: M. Goodman, Not Reported. (301/JMQ)
